message:
feat(FJ-P2C-005-G): E2E scenario scripts for compilation cache/keying

6 scenarios with forensic logging:
1. cache_hit_avoids_recompute: miss→put→hit cycle
2. cache_key_stability_across_restart: file-backed persistence
3. cache_eviction_under_pressure: LRU with max_entries=3
4. strict_mode_rejection: clean error with feature name
5. hardened_mode_inclusion: unknown features affect key
6. cache_key_collision_resistance: 540 distinct keys, 0 collisions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
